## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or maintainer-visible result.

## Why

Explain why this change belongs in starcat-skill and the key constraints it preserves.

## Security and compatibility

Describe security, privacy, compatibility, migration, or release implications. State "None" when not applicable.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant project checks described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or public contracts changed.
- [ ] I did not include credentials, tokens, private data, generated secrets, or unrelated changes.
